Package com.salesforce.multicloudj.dbbackuprestore.driver

Class AbstractDBBackupRestore

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.salesforce.multicloudj.dbbackuprestore.driver.AbstractDBBackupRestore
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Provider, AutoCloseable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AliDBBackupRestore, AwsDBBackupRestore, FSDBBackupRestore
    public abstract class AbstractDBBackupRestore
extends Object
implements Provider, AutoCloseable
    Base class for database backup and restore implementations. This abstract class provides the contract for backup and restore operations across different cloud providers.
    Since:
    0.2.25

    • Nested Class Summary

      Modifier and Type Class Description
      static class  AbstractDBBackupRestore.Builder<T extends AbstractDBBackupRestore,​B extends AbstractDBBackupRestore.Builder<T,​B>>

      • AbstractDBBackupRestore

      • AbstractDBBackupRestore

        protected AbstractDBBackupRestore​(String providerId,
                                  String region,
                                  String resourceName)
        Constructs an AbstractDBBackupRestore instance.
        Parameters:
        providerId - the cloud provider identifier
        region - the region where the database is located
        resourceName - the name of the table to backup/restore

    • Method Detail

      • getProviderId

        public String getProviderId()
        Description copied from interface: Provider
        Retrieves the unique identifier for this provider.
        Specified by:
        getProviderId in interface Provider
        Returns:
        A String representing the provider's ID such as aws.

      • listBackups

        public abstract List<Backup> listBackups()
        Lists all available backups for the table.
        Returns:
        a list of Backup objects representing available backups
        Since:
        0.2.25

      • getBackup

        public abstract Backup getBackup​(String backupId)
        Gets details of a specific backup by its ID.
        Parameters:
        backupId - the unique identifier of the backup
        Returns:
        the Backup object with full metadata
        Since:
        0.2.25

      • restoreBackup

        public abstract String restoreBackup​(RestoreRequest request)
        Restores a table from a backup.
        Parameters:
        request - the restore request containing restore configuration
        Returns:
        the unique identifier of the restore operation for status tracking
        Since:
        0.2.25

      • getRestoreJob

        public abstract Restore getRestoreJob​(String restoreId)
        Gets details of a specific restore operation by its ID.
        Parameters:

        Returns:
        the Restore object with full metadata
        Since:
        0.2.25
